ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie in the primary language of the platform */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue generated by the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Official website of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genre_bridge" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genre_bridge_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genre_bridge_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_language_bridge" (
  "movie_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-language relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_language_bridge_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_language_bridge_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the movie data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, backdrop) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image in pixels */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* File size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_images_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., trailer, clip) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video in pixels */,
  "video_size" INTEGER /* File size of the video in bytes */,
  "video_aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the video */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Length of the video in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_videos_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the movie (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
